ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Build Sales Strategy for EM and FSED services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (RecordType.Name = "EM Sales Opportunity"|| RecordType.Name = "Free-Standing ED Opportunity") && (ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Build Sales Strategy"))&& (ISBLANK(EM__r.Name)|| ISPICKVAL(Bid_Process__c,""))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: RFP Process & EM Incumbent
